item.title: CodeNewbie 模因 | CodeNewbie Memes
item.description:
今天是 DEV 的模因星期一，我们来自 CodeNewbie 的人认为可能是时候开始我们自己的模因线程了，特定于新手！！！！

所以 — 如果您有任何与新手相关、与工作相关或与开始新职业相关的模因或灵感 — 我们很乐意看到它们！ 或者，如果您是新手，欢迎，很高兴您来到这里！

一旦暂停，codenewbieteam 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

一旦解除暂停，codenewbieteam 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，codenewbieteam 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 codenewbieteam 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 codenewbieteam：

降低 codenewbieteam 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 codenewbieteam 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

It's Meme Monday over here at DEV and we from CodeNewbie thought it might be about time that we start our own thread of memes, specific to the newbies!!!!

SO— if you have any newbie-related, job-related, or starting-a-new-career-related memes or inspiration— we would love to see them! OR if you are a newbie, welcome, it's great to have you here!

Once suspended, codenewbieteam will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, codenewbieteam will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by codenewbieteam will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If codenewbieteam is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag codenewbieteam:

Make all posts by codenewbieteam less visible

codenewbieteam consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging codenewbieteam will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: rachelfazio

item.title: 全球真正的兼职工作 | Real Part Time Job In Worldwide
item.description:
布里耶什雷亚尔

发表于 2 月 28 日

真正的兼职工作网站是工作列表平台。 您可以找到兼职工作机会，包括本地求职、远程兼职工作、兼职实习和合同基地工作。 您也可以尝试直接联系您所在地区的企业，询问兼职职位。 此外。

原文:

brijeshreal

Posted on Feb 28

Real Part time Job website is Job Listing Platform. you can find part-time job opportunities, including Local job search, Remote Job for Part Time, Moonligheting Internship & Contract base Job. You can also try contacting businesses in your area directly to inquire about part-time positions. In addition.
